rationale: Neither candidate hits the ground truth's core substantive point (dsocek's suggestion to derive LoRA target discovery from `_packed_modules_mapping`/`stacked_params_mapping` to handle PEFT fused-projection naming conflicts), but X's comment on reusing `pipeline._dit_modules` as a single source of truth is thematically closer to that ask than Y's weaker 'just add a comment noting the duplication' suggestion. X also explicitly notes the validation-request concern was already satisfied via the PR's before/after images, partially covering xuechendi's top-level ask, while Y omits it entirely. Both reviews show convergent, specific file/line citations (pipeline_sdxl.py:46/110, registry.py:427) not present in the diff, suggesting real grounding rather than fabrication, so precision is comparably high; X's proposed fixes (read `_dit_modules`, add a zero-replacement warning log) are more concretely actionable than Y's lower-value asks (add a comment, add a test).
